'''âsh-dh-b-dh''' ('''kashadhbedhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vagabondize|vagabondize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-dh-b-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vagabondize|vagabondize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âsh-dh-b-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kashadhbedhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishadhbedhoko|thishadhbedhoko]] || [[word:jishadhbedhoko|jishadhbedhoko]] || [[word:shishadhbedhoko|shishadhbedhoko]] || [[word:kishadhbedhoko|kishadhbedhoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
